A case outcome is required before closur: A case outcome is required before closure.
At least one Super Admin account must re: At least one Super Admin account must remain active.
Only the assigned expert can record a re: Only the assigned expert can record a response.
The Super Admin role permissions are man: The Super Admin role permissions are managed by the system.
The advisory request cannot be assigned: The advisory request cannot be assigned to an expert at its current stage.
The advisory request is not awaiting dir: The advisory request is not awaiting director review.
The advisory request is not ready for a: The advisory request is not ready for a response.
The advisory request is not ready for re: The advisory request is not ready for requester resubmission.
The case cannot be assigned at its curre: The case cannot be assigned at its current stage.
The case is not awaiting director review: The case is not awaiting director review.
The case is not ready for a hearing reco: The case is not ready for a hearing record.
The case is not ready for closure.
The selected advisory expert is invalid.
The selected advisory team leader is inv: The selected advisory team leader is invalid.
The selected litigation expert is invali: The selected litigation expert is invalid.
The selected litigation team leader is i: The selected litigation team leader is invalid.
The selected civil-law type is invalid.
This advisory category cannot be deleted: This advisory category cannot be deleted while it is used by advisory requests.
This court cannot be deleted while it is: This court cannot be deleted while it is used by legal cases.
This department cannot be deleted while: This department cannot be deleted while it is still linked to users or advisory requests.
This legal case type cannot be deleted w: This legal case type cannot be deleted while it is used by legal cases.
This team cannot be deleted while it is: This team cannot be deleted while it is still assigned to users.
You cannot delete your own user account: You cannot delete your own user account from user management.
You may only submit advisory requests fo: You may only submit advisory requests for your own department.

dashboard.role_description.department_re: Submit advisory requests, monitor progress, and review issued responses.
dashboard.role_description.legal_directo: Review legal matters, approve workflow decisions, and monitor institutional delivery.
dashboard.role_description.legal_expert: Work assigned legal matters, record progress, and submit final responses.
dashboard.role_description.litigation_te: Assign litigation work, supervise hearings, and balance case workload.
dashboard.role_description.registrar: Register court cases, maintain intake quality, and monitor upcoming hearings.
dashboard.role_description.super_admin: Full system oversight, administration, and configuration control.

public.about.description: This platform supports legal advisory intake, court case coordination, document tracking, accountability, and institutional legal reporting.
public.about.title: About the legal department
public.contact.description: Reach the legal department through the official contact channels below for institutional support and follow-up.
public.contact.hours_value: Working hours available in system settings
public.contact.title: Contact information
public.cta.description: Submit a formal advisory request, follow its workflow status, and keep your department informed through the portal.
public.cta.side_description: Use the requester portal to submit legal advisory requests and follow their progress through every approval stage.
public.cta.title: Need legal support from the department?
public.highlights.accountable_descriptio: Every decision, comment, assignment, and timeline update is recorded for follow-up and auditability.
public.highlights.bilingual_description: The platform supports both English and Amharic for institutional communication and requester access.
public.highlights.secure_description: Requests, approvals, assignments, and supporting records are handled through a controlled legal workflow.
public.home.description: The legal department provides structured advisory support, workflow tracking, and institutional case follow-up for all departments.
public.home.heading: Request legal support, follow workflow progress, and access official legal updates in one place.
public.home.title: Institutional legal services portal
public.portal.description: Department users can submit requests, track progress, review responses, and follow every workflow stage from a single portal.
public.portal.notifications_hint: Review updates, reminders, and workflow alerts sent to your account.
public.portal.title: Access the legal services portal
public.posts.description: Read recent announcements, legal guidance updates, and institutional notices published by the legal department.
public.posts.title: Latest legal updates
public.process.description: Each request follows a controlled institutional workflow so legal matters are reviewed, assigned, and documented with accountability.
public.process.step_four_description: The legal expert records the opinion, notes, attachments, and completion details in the system.
public.process.step_one_description: A department requester registers the matter and submits the legal advisory request through the portal.
public.process.step_three_description: The advisory team leader assigns the matter to the appropriate legal expert.
public.process.step_two_description: The legal director reviews the request and decides whether to return, reject, or forward it.
public.process.title: How the advisory workflow works
public.registration.description: Register a department requester account to submit legal advisory requests and track them online.
public.registration.title: Create requester account
public.services.advisory_description: Departments can submit written or verbal legal advisory requests and track review, assignment, and response stages.
public.services.case_support_description: The litigation team monitors court schedules, hearings, decisions, appeal deadlines, and case outcomes.
public.services.description: Departments can access structured legal advisory, litigation support coordination, and policy guidance through a single governed platform.
public.services.policy_description: The legal department supports institutional compliance, legal interpretation, and official internal guidance.
public.services.title: Core services
public.slider.slide_one_subtitle: Start advisory requests with complete departmental information and follow every approval stage from submission to response.
public.slider.slide_three_subtitle: Stay informed through published legal notices, guidance updates, and departmental announcements.
public.slider.slide_two_subtitle: See where your request stands, when it was reviewed, and what action is expected next.

public_posts.empty_description: Create a post to publish legal updates and institutional announcements.

roles.edit_description: Update this role's name and permissions. Only the Super Admin role keeps protected system safeguards.
roles.empty_description: No roles matched the current filters.
roles.index_description: Review system roles, assigned users, and permission coverage across the organization.
roles.protected_description: Only the Super Admin permission bundle is protected by the system. Workflow access is controlled by permissions, not role names.
roles.create_description: Create a custom role and assign the permission coverage it needs.
roles.delete_confirm: Delete this role? This action cannot be undone.
roles.delete_description: Delete this custom role if it is no longer needed.
roles.delete_in_use_description: This role still has assigned users. Deletion will be blocked until those assignments are removed.
roles.in_use_delete_error: This role is still assigned to one or more users. Remove those assignments before deleting the role.
roles.name_hint: Use a unique business-friendly role name for custom access control.
roles.permission_search_empty: No permissions matched the current search.
roles.permission_search_placeholder: Filter permissions by name or label
roles.protected_permissions_error: The Super Admin role permissions are managed by the system.
roles.system_delete_error: The Super Admin role cannot be deleted.
roles.system_name_description: Only the Super Admin role name is protected. Workflow access is controlled by permissions, not role names.
roles.system_name_locked_error: Only the Super Admin role name is protected, and it cannot be renamed.
settings.description: Manage this deployment's identity, branding, public content, localization, notifications, security, and appearance from one secure settings workspace.
settings.hints.allowed_file_types: Use a comma-separated list such as pdf, docx, png, jpg.
settings.hints.bot_token: Enter the Telegram bot token created in BotFather. Leave this field blank to keep the currently saved token.
settings.hints.bot_token_configured: A bot token is already saved: :token
settings.hints.bot_token_missing: No Telegram bot token is currently saved.
settings.hints.bot_username: Optional display username for reference, for example @legal_alerts_bot.
settings.hints.default_chat_target: Enter the target Telegram chat ID or channel username where system alerts should be delivered. Use a numeric chat ID or a public @channel username.
settings.hints.favicon: Upload a small square icon for browser tabs and bookmarks.
settings.hints.stamp: Upload the official stamp image used for branded administrative output. PNG only.
settings.hints.hero_slides: Manage the homepage hero carousel content, action links, order, and background images.
settings.hints.system_logo: Upload the main organization or legal department logo used across the public site and the internal workspace.
settings.hints.telegram: Configure Telegram so the system can send operational alerts and workflow updates to a verified Telegram chat.
settings.hints.telegram_credentials: Create a bot with BotFather, copy the bot token into this page, then add the bot to the destination chat and record its chat ID.
settings.hints.telegram_enabled: Enable the Telegram provider only after the bot token and destination chat have been verified.
settings.hints.telegram_notes: Use notes for deployment context or handover details. Do not paste full secrets into the notes field.
settings.hints.telegram_overview: Telegram notifications allow the system to send alerts and status updates to a configured Telegram chat.
settings.hints.telegram_security: Treat the bot token as a secret. Only trusted administrators should manage it, and the full token is not shown again after saving.
settings.hints.telegram_test: Save any Telegram changes before sending a test message. The test message uses the saved default chat target and current bot token.
settings.preview_surface_description: Buttons, cards, and accents across the public site and internal workspace will follow these saved branding tokens.
settings.title: System Settings

welcome.description: Coordinate legal workflows, court matters, audit visibility, notifications, and bilingual service delivery across the institution.
welcome.feature.advisory_description: Route legal advisory requests through requester submission, director review, assignment, and expert response.
welcome.feature.cases_description: Track case intake, assignments, hearings, decisions, and closure with a complete legal history.
welcome.feature.reporting_description: Monitor dashboards, exports, activity history, and reminders that support legal operations management.
welcome.footer: Built for structured institutional legal workflow management.
welcome.heading: Manage legal advisory requests, court cases, accountability, and follow-up from one secure platform.
welcome.title: Legal department operations platform
